name: Double Pesto Tortellini with Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Washed, trimmed spinach (leaves tightly packed)
1/4 cup Slivered or whole blanched almonds
recipeInstructions:
Cook tortellini in a large pot of rapidly boiling salted water, for about 25 minutes or until tender, stirring occasionally. Drain.
In a medium frying pan over medium heat, saute almonds in 2 tbsp olive oil until golden. Remove with slotted spoon; drain.
Add shrimp and garlic to the pan; saute until shrimp are cooked. Remove from the pan.
Add halved cherry tomatoes to the pan. Saute for 1 minute. Remove from the pan.
Add pesto sauce to the pan; heat through.
Combine tortellini and all cooked ingredients with the pesto sauce in a large bowl. Toss to blend; serve immediately.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings
